landmark_label: Lowest sentinel grate (SE proximal; v0.6 lowest_sentinel_grate at 3.60 NAVD88)
observed_qualitative: 1-2 cm shy of grate top; rising tide
notes: Live observation — pre-peak. Photos start at 21:56. v0.7 proposes renaming to grate_SE.

observed_qualitative: water at top of slots; wet 'splat' forming around grate
notes: Photo 1 EXIF. v0.6 model with +0.40 enhancement overshoots by ~6.2 inches.

landmark_label: Bay Ave upstream grate (v0.7 candidate; ~3.76 NAVD88 inferred)
observed_qualitative: water just barely emerging at low points of grate top; dry at high points (uneven grate)
notes: Photos 8-9 EXIF. Grate top elevation ~3.74-3.78 NAVD88; uneven. NOT in v0.6 model.

landmark_label: Gutter at walkway (v0.6 gutter_walkway at 3.78 NAVD88)
observed_qualitative: thin 'worm' stream visible along curb-gutter line — originating from upstream grate (not corner grate)
notes: Photo 10 EXIF. Confirms upstream grate (not corner grate) is the primary feeder to the gutter. v0.6 model with +0.40 overshoots significantly.

landmark_label: User's corner grate (NE; survey elev 3.80 NAVD88 — v0.6 had 3.91 in error; 3.91 is the corner_NE pavement)
observed_qualitative: 2-2.5 inches below grate top; rising tide
notes: Live observation. With corrected 3.80 grate elev: water at ~3.59-3.63 NAVD88; SH-implied baseline 3.74; implied local enhancement ~-0.13 ft (negative — water at 342 lagged Sandy Hook on rising tide). v0.6 +0.40 overshoots by ~5 inches.

landmark_label: SW distal grate (v0.7 candidate; ~3.55-3.58 NAVD88 inferred — ~0.5\" lower than SE)
observed_qualitative: at least 1.5 inches above grate; SW overflowing at same time or earlier than SE
notes: Live observation. SW concentrates depth above grate; SE spreads more widely.

landmark_label: User's corner grate (NE; corrected elev 3.80 NAVD88)
observed_qualitative: 1-1.5 inches below grate top at or near peak
notes: Live observation at observed peak. With corrected 3.80 grate elev: water at 3.68-3.72 NAVD88; SH-implied baseline 3.76; implied local enhancement ~-0.04 to -0.08 ft (near zero, slightly negative). v0.6 +0.40 overshoots by ~4 inches.
